form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr2) over 2125m at this track beaten 40 m by American Boxer (2:34.40) in NR up to 55 on March 2 at $7.50. At the start before was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr6) over 1609m at Newcastle was 8th-15.33 at the bell, beaten 19 m by Colossal Hope (1:52.30) in NR up to 58 on February 20 at $19. Can improve sharply from the ace draw.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Good run when 3rd (Fr1) over 1609m after showing early pace at Menangle was leading by 2.7 at the bell, beaten 4 m by Myth You Already (1:53.40) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on March 24 at $1.50. Fitter and draws well so can atone.

form.formComment: Finding it hard to put a couple of good runs together. Last start was 3rd (Fr3) over 2125m after showing early pace at this track was 3rd-4.12 at the bell, beaten 4.5 m by Rocknroll Cowboy (2:34.70) in NR up to 53 on April 2 at $126. Before that beaten 22 metres, fifth at this track over 1720m NR up to 53 on March 26. Not likely to threaten this time.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing seventh after showing early speed, behind Mister Quirk at this track over 2125m in a NR up to 70 on March 20 at $13. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.2 m finishing third after showing early speed, behind Allstarzzz Frankie at Bathurst over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 80 GH on March 25 at $23. Down in grade so is expected to feature again.
